author: y4rr
content: Result: Delivered Sprint V.2 MobileNetV2/V3 forward parity (#932). Added 10 fixture-backed conformance tests (5 per model: output_shape, param_count, output_finite, custom_classes, determinism) to conformance_vision_models.rs. Extended scripts/regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py with V.2 sections. Updated fixtures_v_parity.json (15 new V.2 entries, 40 total). All 115 conformance_vision_models tests pass. Workspace build and clippy --workspace --all-targets clean. No source changes to mobilenet.rs needed.
